scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,proxy,client" --prefix-colors "blue,yellow,green" "npm run start" "npm run dev --prefix proxy" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.kill:local: sh -c 'for port in 3001 5173; do pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:$port 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then echo "Killing process(es) on port $port: $pids"; kill -9 $pids 2>/dev/null || true; fi; done'
scripts.dev:clean: npm run kill:local && npm run build && npm run dev
